2111020110222211012201112212121010020000001202112 - ASI: 30

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  110 = 11 * 0
  112 = 11 * 2
  202 = 20 * 2
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0020 = 00 * 20
  1101 = 11 * 01
  2101 = 21 * 01
  2121 = 21 * 21
  2201 = 22 * 01
  11022 = 110 * 22
  21110 = 21 * 110
  000001 = 00 * 0001
  202112 = 202 * 112
  221101 = 22 * 1101
  2011022 = 20 * 11022
  2201112 = 2201 * 112
  21010020 = 2101 * 0020
  000001202112 = 000001 * 202112
  211102011022 = 21110 * 2011022
  212121010020 = 2121 * 21010020
  2211012201112 = 221101 * 2201112
  212121010020000001202112 = 212121010020 * 000001202112
  2111020110222211012201112 = 211102011022 * 2211012201112
  2111020110222211012201112212121010020000001202112 = 2111020110222211012201112 * 212121010020000001202112
